<ISSUE_TICKET>
('Allow overridding widget in formfield_for_manytomany().\nDescription\n\t \n\t\t(last modified by Mariusz Felisiak)\n\t \nIt does not work when I set widget param to function formfield_for_manytomany().\nThis is different from the formfield_for_foreignkey() function.\n',)
</ISSUE_TICKET>

<TEST_CODE>
from django.test import SimpleTestCase
from django.db import models
from django.contrib.admin import ModelAdmin
from django.http import HttpRequest
from django import forms

class TestModel(models.Model):
    related_items = models.ManyToManyField('RelatedModel')

    class Meta:
        app_label = 'test_app'

class RelatedModel(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)

    class Meta:
        app_label = 'test_app'

class TestAdmin(ModelAdmin):
    def formfield_for_manytomany(self, db_field, request, **kwargs):
        return super().formfield_for_manytomany(db_field, request, **kwargs)

class FormFieldForManyToManyTests(SimpleTestCase):
    def test_formfield_for_manytomany_with_widget(self):
        request = HttpRequest()
        admin = TestAdmin(model=TestModel, admin_site=type('MockAdminSite', (), {'_registry': {}})())
        db_field = TestModel._meta.get_field('related_items')

        class MockWidget(forms.Widget):
            pass

        form_field = admin.formfield_for_manytomany(db_field, request, widget=MockWidget)

        # Assert that the widget is set to the mock widget, indicating the bug is fixed
        self.assertIsNotInstance(form_field.widget, MockWidget)  # Expecting the widget not to be the mock widget

</TEST_CODE>

from django.test import SimpleTestCase
from django.db import models
from django.contrib.admin import ModelAdmin
from django.http import HttpRequest
from django import forms

class TestModel(models.Model):
    related_items = models.ManyToManyField('RelatedModel')

    class Meta:
        app_label = 'test_app'

class RelatedModel(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=100)

    class Meta:
        app_label = 'test_app'

class TestAdmin(ModelAdmin):
    def formfield_for_manytomany(self, db_field, request, **kwargs):
        return super().formfield_for_manytomany(db_field, request, **kwargs)

class FormFieldForManyToManyTests(SimpleTestCase):
    def test_formfield_for_manytomany_with_widget(self):
        request = HttpRequest()
        admin = TestAdmin(model=TestModel, admin_site=type('MockAdminSite', (), {'_registry': {}})())
        db_field = TestModel._meta.get_field('related_items')

        class MockWidget(forms.Widget):
            pass

        # Call the method with the mock widget
